title: The weekly evolution showcase decision
note: hero example for the design-process-evolution sub-post: deciding the evolution showcase frame for the-weekly case study

turns.text:
**Step 9 — summary.**

Designed the evolution showcase for the-weekly case study: three live interactive versions of the app (POC / design overhaul / current) embedded as a tab switcher under Lesson 2, hosted on three Cloudflare Workers, with per-stage iframe state preserved via `hidden`-toggling (not `src`-swapping). Decision-led captions per stage, not a "got better at design" frame.

**Committed:**
- `portfolio/main` → `9b9e3a4` (plan, chunk 4d scope, CLAUDE.md status, DIARY)
- `workspace/master` → `533aa50` (learning diary entry)

**Branches open:** none. Portfolio on `main`, workspace on `master`, both pushed.

**Next session:**
1. Chunk 4c.1 — case study design explorers (with the new `<ProjectTimeline>` + both `<ChatTranscript>` sender-colour variants)
2. Chunk 4d — prose rewrite + build, including the evolution showcase execution per `plans/the-weekly-evolution-showcase.md`
3. Two pre-existing transcript drafts still pending in `portfolio/src/content/transcripts/drafts/` — promote / edit / skip when ready

**Pending:** no blockers.
